---
title: "Lectures"
---

|            | Date     | Topic | Materials |
|------------|----------|-------|-----------|
| Lecture 1  | May 11   | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 2  | May 13   | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 3  | May 15   | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 4  | May 18   | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 5  | May 20   | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 6  | May 22   | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 7  | May 27   | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 8  | May 29   | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 9  | June 1   | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 10 | June 3   | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 11 | June 5   | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 12 | June 8   | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 13 | June 10  | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 14 | June 12  | TBA   | TBA       |
| Lecture 15 | June 15  | TBA   | TBA       |
